note: Reference for the Open Apparel Registry as a neutral, open-source, free tool for mapping garment facilities and assigning unique facility IDs.

title: OpenLab Microfactory
note: Reference for distributed, participatory, modular microfactory research using open-source hardware and software tools.

title: OSE Microfactory Concept
note: Reference for open-source microfactory concepts and distributed fabrication as an enabling primitive.
